backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor implementing emotional check-in system with user profiles, access control, and supportive response generation based on user feelings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including mood dropdown preservation, resource card flip animations, music/video recommendations updates, and voice conversation debugging.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files describing authentication, chat interface, emotion tracking, voice synthesis, guest mode, and resource card components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system variables for light/dark themes and base styling for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'Ana - Your Friend in Every Emotional Need' and meta description for the emotional support application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing authentication state, guest mode, and conditional rendering of WelcomeScreen, ChatPage, or ProfileSetupModal with React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/ConversationHist: Displays chat-style conversation history of emotional check-ins with Ana's supportive responses, including speech synthesis cleanup and comprehensive debug logging.
frontend/src/components/ConversationInpu: A form component for submitting emotional check-ins with mood selection, text/voice input, and dynamic resource cards based on selected emotion. Integrates speech recognition and displays mood-specific resources (food, music, stories, self-care, videos).
frontend/src/components/GuestPromptBanne: A dismissible banner prompting guest users to create an account to save conversations permanently. Uses session storage to persist dismissal state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper providing header with logo, share button, login/guest status, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution. Handles app-wide navigation and branding.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout and guest-to-authenticated user transitions. Clears query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name during initial setup. Cannot be dismissed and saves profile data via mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ResourceCard.tsx: A flip card component displaying mood-related resources with an image front and a list of external links on the back. Supports keyboard navigation and accessibility.
Displays AI-generated supportive responses with main message, relatable story, action options, and follow-up questions. Automatically triggers text-to-speech for responses.
frontend/src/components/VoiceRecordingIn: Visual indicator component showing animated microphone icon and pulsing bars when voice recording is active.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication. Handles anonymous and authenticated actors, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCheckIns.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and adding check-ins with AI responses, supporting both authenticated backend storage and guest mode via localStorage. Includes fallback response generation when backend responses are unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestCheckIns.ts: Manages guest user check-ins stored in localStorage, providing functions to load, add, and clear check-in data with supportive responses. Converts between storage format and runtime BigInt timestamps.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle. Includes status tracking for initialization, login, and error states.
Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech Recognition API for voice-to-text transcription with support for interim results, continuous listening, and error handling. Provides transcript state and control functions for starting/stopping/resetting recognition.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech Synthesis API for text-to-speech functionality with voice selection, playback control, and extensive logging. Manages speaking state and provides functions to speak, stop, and pause audio.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving user profile data via the backend actor. Includes automatic cache invalidation on profile updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes using warm peach/coral tones. Includes flip card animation styles and typography settings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication. Renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat interface page that displays conversation history with check-ins and responses, handles guest vs authenticated modes, and includes auto-scrolling and refresh logic with extensive debug logging.
frontend/src/pages/WelcomeScreen.tsx: Landing page component that presents users with two authentication options: continue as guest with local storage or login with Internet Identity for permanent cloud storage.
frontend/src/utils/moodResourceLinks.ts: Provides mood-based resource links (food recipes, music, activities) mapped to different emotional states like sad, stressed, happy, anxious, etc., with external URLs to relevant content.
frontend/src/utils/shareHelpers.ts: Utility functions for sharing content using the Web Share API with clipboard fallback, including support detection and share text generation for conversation summaries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing utilities that work with both standard query strings and hash-based routing, including sessionStorage persistence and parameter cleanup functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/fonts, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state file for 'Ana' emotional guide app tracking 23 versions, architectural decisions, and known issues. Documents features including conversational interface, guest mode, mood-based recommendations, voice input/output, and research-based empathetic responses with current critical issues being non-functional response generation and voice conversation.
